title: POKELAND
description: Cobblemon 1.7.1 Modpack | Legendary Pokémon | Mega Evolutions | Pokémon Towns | Centers | Gyms | Leaders | Trainers | New Generations | New Food & Drink | Optimization | Essential | Voice Chat | Surround Sound | Automatic Data & Resource Pack.
body:
---
🔮✨ A Fantasy Pokémon Adventure in Minecraft ✨🔮

Welcome to PokeLand, the ultimate modpack for Pokémon lovers and fantasy explorers! 🌎⚔️ Immerse yourself in a brand-new experience where magic and RPG elements blend seamlessly with the incredible Cobblemon mod, creating a world filled with creatures, challenges, and mysteries waiting to be uncovered.

You can install the English or Spanish edition from the “Versions” tab.

### 🌍 A Living, Fantastic World > Explore a vast world with new exotic biomes and uncharted dimensions, each with its own unique structures and hidden secrets. From lush enchanted forests to frozen tundras and mysterious volcanic lands, every corner of this world is a perfect setting for adventure and exploration.
### 🏛️ Legendary Structures and Hidden Locations > Discover ancient ruins, forgotten temples, and lost cities as you traverse the land in search of new challenges. Each structure holds treasures and mysteries, so stay alert and claim them before anyone else!
### 🎮 Epic Pokémon Battles and Challenges > Catch and train every Pokémon in existence! 🏆 Become the ultimate trainer by exploring, capturing, and training your perfect team. Face off against rivals, challenging NPCs, and legendary creatures in battles that will test your strategy and skills.
### 🔨 Unlimited Creativity: New Blocks and Building > If you love building, this modpack will amaze you with a massive variety of new blocks and materials. Design your own Pokémon gym, create a hidden base in a magical cave, or build entire cities with medieval and fantasy styles. The only limit is your imagination!
### 🍲 Crafting and Food for Survival > Adventure requires energy, and in PokeLand, you’ll find a vast array of new recipes and food crafting to keep you ready for battle and exploration. From exotic dishes to magical potions, everything is designed to enrich your journey in this unique world.
### 🌟 Collect, Explore, and Become a Legend > Your goal is clear: explore every corner of this world, catch every Pokémon, and become the best trainer in PokeLand. But the journey won’t be easy… You’ll need strategy, courage, and determination to conquer every biome and uncover all the secrets this incredible world has to offer.

Gameplay Recommendations - Install at least 6 GB of RAM for the modpack to run smoothly. - To play multiplayer, you must invite a friend using the Essential mod. - To give the PokeLand kit to a friend, use the command: ``` /sk give PokeLand ```

🔥 The adventure awaits in PokeLand! 🔥
Do you have what it takes to explore it all and become a Pokémon master?

--- _by. elMaxeus_
